title: Tell It to the Judge
writer: Nat Perrin, Roland Kibbee, Devery Freeman
actors: Rosalind Russell, Robert Cummings, Gig Young
plot: Marsha Meredith, an attorney-at-law, is nominated for a Federal judgeship but her nomination is opposed by a 'Good-Government' group who think her divorce makes her unfit for the job. This evolves into situations happening in Flor...
